packs.name: Daily Agenda
packs.description: Displays your daily Google/iCal calendar agenda, status, and local weather forecast.

config_schema.name: ha_calendar_entities
config_schema.label: Configured Calendars
config_schema.help: Pick one or more calendars already set up in Home Assistant -- Google Calendar, Local Calendar, CalDAV, or any other calendar integration. Events from all selected calendars are merged together. Leave all unchecked to use the first available calendar.

config_schema.name: calendar_url
config_schema.label: Calendar iCal URL
config_schema.help: To get this: Open Google Calendar on desktop, go to **Settings** > click your calendar name in the left panel > scroll down to **Integrate calendar** > copy the **Secret address in iCal format**.

packs.name: xOTD (Day-of-the-Day)
packs.description: Displays a daily joke, quote, or scripture verse -- fetched from the web or a local custom list -- on a premium high-contrast layout. Create multiple instances to run different content types on different frames and schedules.

config_schema.name: drop_cap
config_schema.label: Drop Cap
config_schema.help: Renders a large decorative tile around the first letter of the main text, left-aligned in an editorial style.

config_schema.name: joke_api_url
config_schema.label: Custom Joke API URL
config_schema.help: Leave blank to use the custom jokes list below instead. Accepts either {"joke": "..."} or {"setup": "...", "punchline": "..."} response shapes.

config_schema.name: custom_jokes
config_schema.label: Custom Jokes List
config_schema.help: A JSON array of **{"setup": "...", "punchline": "..."}** objects, or plain **{"joke": "..."}** one-liners (both shapes accepted). One is shown per day, cycling through the list. Only used if no Custom Joke API URL is set above.

config_schema.name: quote_api_url
config_schema.label: Custom Quote API URL
config_schema.help: Leave blank to use the custom quotes list below instead.

config_schema.name: custom_quotes
config_schema.label: Custom Quotes List
config_schema.help: A JSON array of **{"q": "quote text", "a": "author"}** objects. One is shown per day, cycling through the list. Only used if no Custom Quote API URL is set above.

config_schema.name: custom_scriptures
config_schema.label: Custom Scriptures List
config_schema.help: A JSON array of **{"q": "verse text", "r": "reference", "t": "translation"}** objects. One is shown per day, cycling through the list.

config_schema.name: word_api_url
config_schema.label: Custom Word API URL
config_schema.help: Leave blank to use the custom words list below instead. Expects a JSON response shaped like {"word": "...", "pos": "...", "definition": "...", "example": "..."}.

config_schema.name: custom_words
config_schema.label: Custom Words List
config_schema.help: A JSON array of **{"word", "pos", "definition", "example"}** objects. One is shown per day, cycling through the list. Only used if no Custom Word API URL is set above.
